raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "issue": "Unbounded database query in /assessment/next endpoint: fetches all items regardless of user level, risking OOM at scale.", "recommended_fix": "Add LIMIT 50 and index on (competency, difficulty) for paginated item retrieval."}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "engine.py", "issue": "IRT scoring computed on every request without caching; latency will spike at 10x users.", "recommended_fix": "Cache theta estimates per user in Redis with 5m TTL and trigger async recalc on item submit."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/hooks/use-energy-mode.ts", "issue": "Energy mode update fires 4x per change via duplicate event listeners, increasing latency.", "recommended_fix": "Consolidate Supabase and local storage sync into single handler."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "engine.py", "apps/web/src/hooks/use-energy-mode.ts"]}

findings.issue: Unbounded database query in /assessment/next endpoint: fetches all items regardless of user level, risking OOM at scale.
findings.recommended_fix: Add LIMIT 50 and index on (competency, difficulty) for paginated item retrieval.

findings.issue: IRT scoring computed on every request without caching; latency will spike at 10x users.
findings.recommended_fix: Cache theta estimates per user in Redis with 5m TTL and trigger async recalc on item submit.

findings.issue: Energy mode update fires 4x per change via duplicate event listeners, increasing latency.
findings.recommended_fix: Consolidate Supabase and local storage sync into single handler.
